programme.title: Guardians
programme.desc: Twilight Cove, a small forgotten town, is besieged by hideous creatures summoned into our dimension. It's only a matter of time before the army of creatures attacks the rest of civilization and wreaks havoc upon the world. At dusk, a beat-up truck containing a rag-tag team of hardened mercenaries rolls into town, and this is not the first time they've been called in to exterminate they are part of a secret society that has been operating outside of the government and the public eye for thousands of years. Their mission is to keep our world safe from evil-of our own creation and from beyond.

programme.title: RIIZE Music Video & Performance Special
programme.desc: Track List: Love 119, Impossible, One Kiss, 9 Days, Boom Boom Bass, Lucky, Be My Next, Combo, Love 119 (Performance Video), Hug Love 119 (Japanese Ver.), Honestly, Hug (Stage Clip), Bag Bad Back, Ember to Solar, Fly Up, Show Me Love, Passage, Midnight Mirage, The End of the Day, Inside My Love, Another Life

programme.title: Unleash Your Confidence Playlist
programme.desc: This playlist is for the bold and unstoppable you. Packed with vibrant energy and powerful sounds playlist.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: NCT DREAM The 4th Album 'DREAMSCAPE' Playlist
programme.desc: 8. Heavenly 1. INTRO : DREAMSCAPE 4. i hate fruits 9. Night Poem The title 「DREAMSCAPE」 signifies a long-awaited, dreamlike landscape and world, capturing the excitement and freedom of youth within this utopian realm. Across 11 tracks, a dynamic storyline unfolds like a fairytale, vividly portraying the radiant moments of youth in a dramatic way. 6. Best of Me [Track List] 3. Flying Kiss 10. Off The Wall 11. Rains in Heaven7. programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Zitten! This artist made his debut in 2005 with the EP Rock Doves and has been nourishing the hearts of countless listeners with his delicate lyrical lyrics and heartwarming music since then. Also known for drawing his inspiration from various everyday elements he comforts our souls in a calm yet powerful way. Last December Zitten released the Christmas song All You Need Is A Carol to tell us not to take anything for granted. Then in January this year he started a new project to produce music inspired by places he visited books he read things he purchased and films he watched. The very first outcome of that new project is the song Little forest which he performs on I'm LIVE. He also performs Let's do well Something to say and more to showcase the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and meet Zitten!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Choi Gonne! Choi Gonne burst into the music scene in 2010 with the EP 36.5°. Since then she has covered numerous genres of music ranging from folk music rock and jazz not to mention pansori that she learned to sing when she was a child. She's also known for her mix of melodic acoustic themes powerful vocals and sheer lyrical prowess which together make her one of a kind. Last but not least she's the first Korean artist to be invited three times to perform at the Glastonbury Festival in the U.K. In this episode Choi Gonne performs ‘HIGHLANDER' ‘Eric's song' and more to display the essence of her artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and meet Choi Gonne!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is Band Nah! Band Nah is composed of vocalist and guitarist Nah Sang-hyun drummer Kang Hyun-woong and bassist Paiiek. The three students at Seoul National University met each other through the school's composition club and then they released their first song together in 2014 as part of the Why Not Study project organized by the university. The following year they made their official debut in the music scene and have been actively growing their discography and exploring further new facets of their sound since then. Their performance of the song Nights received rave reviews in VOCALPLAY 2 in 2019 and then in 2020 they won the Rookie Green Friends of the Greenplugged-Seoul 2020 making us anticipate their future. In this episode Band Nah performs Lights Life Colour Are You There? All The Time and Nights to show off their musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and take a glimpse into their artistic world!

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.582
programme.desc: ILY:1, YGIG, KISS OF LIFE, ARTBEAT v, Yoon Seobin, BXB, fishingirls, Q6IX, XEED, ABLUE

programme.title: After School Club: tripleS Ep.555
programme.desc: Far apart, but together in heart!We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!The first ASC episode of 2023 with tripleS! programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: Bride of the Century
programme.desc: Taeyang Group Is The Largest Conglomerate In South Korea, But The Choi Family, Who Runs Taeyang, Has Supposedly Been Under A Hundred-Year Curse - The First Bride Of The Eldest Son Will Always Die. Choi Gang Ju, The Current Heir To Taeyang Group, Had Been Arranged To Marry Heiress Jang I Gyeong When She Suddenly Disappears.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dates From Hell: Piece of My Heart
programme.desc: A young college student is confronted by her obsessive ex-boyfriend after a date his anger gets the best of him.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: Dolores and Maria Ross' longstanding sibling rivalry escalates out of control, eventually ending in bloodshed.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: Life inside the Fuss home turns into a nightmare after a sibling rivalry spirals out of control and reaches a new level of depravity.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: Life with their beautiful daughters is a dream come true for an optometrist and his wife, but the dream soon becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: A small-town cashier's life turns into a nightmare when her stepmother and stepbrothers move in, then she goes missing, leaving her family to wonder if she left to start a new life.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: Greed, jealousy and the quest for power threatens the Woodman family's lavish lifestyle as a vicious plot unfolds.

programme.title: Evil Kin
programme.desc: The Georges' lives turn upside down when greed rears its ugly head and someone in the family becomes marked as investigators uncover the truth, some of the family members find themselves on the road to destruction.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: In the second segment of Netanagari, we discuss the India vs Pakistan match in the T20 World Cup played on 15 February and the politics around it. With Bangladesh out of the tournament, this segment explains who is ahead, what challenges India may face, and how politics connects with cricket.

programme.title: Ground Report
programme.desc: A 25-year-old labourer died after falling into an open manhole on DDA land in Rohini, Delhi. This is the second such death in the capital within five days, and police reached the spot after receiving a PCR call.

programme.title: GITN
programme.desc: Guest in the Newsroom | in this episode, former Air Chief Marshal BS Dhanoa answers tough questions on Balakot, Operation Sindoor, Abhinandan vs F-16, and the truth behind cloud cover claims. A rare, no-filter look at India's air wars, strategy, and decision-making from the man who led the IAF.

programme.title: Baithki
programme.desc: The Lallantop

programme.title: Kitabwala
programme.desc: In this episode of Kitabwala, we explore Atal Bihari Vajpayee beyond speeches and power. Author Abhishek Chaudhary shares untold stories, inner conflicts, and personal anecdotes that shaped Vajpayee's political journey and legacy.

programme.title: Rakhwale
programme.desc: Rakhwale 2.0 | in this first episode, host Vikas Verma speaks with retired IAF Wing Commander Arijit Ghosh as he shares inspiring real-life stories of courage and sacrifice. A gripping account of the Indian Air Force's valour and the spirit of those who guard our skies.

programme.title: LT Insider
programme.desc: In this episode of Lallantop Insider, Chetan Bhagat shares his thoughts on Gen Z dating, social media validation, hookup culture, and modern romance. He also talks about his new book 12 Years: My Messed-up Love Story.

programme.title: The Lallantop
programme.desc: Today on the LT show, Siddhant breaks down a viral AI debate sparked by Hyperwrite AI CEO Matt Shumer's essay, and what the real-world risks look like. Also: a USTR map controversy involving PoK/Aksai Chin, and Bangladesh's election landslide for BNP.

programme.title: Duniyadari
programme.desc: BNP swept Bangladesh's parliamentary election, returning to power after nearly 20 years and putting Tarique Rahman in the spotlight as the likely next prime minister. We break down what drove the win, Tarique's key promises, and what it could mean for India.

programme.title: Kharcha Paani
programme.desc: Kharcha Paani explains the airline vs government face-off over DGCA's new fatigue rules after IndiGo's December 2025 chaos, and why FIA says the norms could disrupt schedules and raise fares. What it means for delays, cancellations, and passengers—decoded.

programme.title: Social List
programme.desc: This episode breaks down 4 viral stories: the Ahmedabad plane crash debate sparked by an Italian media report (with DGCA's final report still pending), the trending “QuitGPT” backlash, plus aliens speaking Rajasthani in a TV serial and a disturbing Noida safety clip—reaction + context, not final claims.

programme.title: Sehat
programme.desc: Today's show covers antibiotics & gut health, whether BP medicines can harm kidneys, and which dairy option has the most protein and is best for digestion—featuring experts from gastroenterology, nephrology, and nutrition.

programme.title: The Cinema Show
programme.desc: In this episode of The Cinema Show, we reveal Shah Rukh Khan's next director collaboration after King, Priyanka Chopra's fresh update on SS Rajamouli's Varanasi, and Ranveer Singh's upcoming big project. All the latest cinema updates—decoded!

programme.title: Rajdhani
programme.desc: In this episode of Rajdhani, we break down the Parliament storm over Rahul Gandhi's remarks and the Modi government's surprise U-turn on the privilege motion—what changed behind the scenes, and why. From Budget Session flashpoints to past missteps, here's the full political decode.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: Invention Story S02 EP 27

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs S1 Ep 31
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome Epi 01
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 21
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Robo needs to find Zitron and stop the dinosaur terrorising Car City before it causes any more chaos.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron blocked the road with mud, and cars are getting stuck! Rodeo and Booster merge in an attempt to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: It' s Rodeo' s birthday! Zitron' s present—a flying shark—goes wild and turns on the guests. Robo comes to the rescue with Carrie' s help.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: It's Ben's Parade in Car City. Zitron escapes from jail, planning to ruin the fun, but Robo foils his plan.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: Singing louder than any animal on earth, humpback whales are famous for their haunting songs and jaw-dropping acrobatics. They were hunted to the brink of extinction until a moratorium on killing them was implemented in the 1960s. But after finally rebounding in numbers, whaling nations are exploring ways to re-open the hunt. In Antarctica, Japan is targeting minke, fin, and now... humpbacks.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: The Oceanic White Tip is one of the only sharks that makes Ian Gordon nervous. Fast, aggressive pack-hunters, these sharks wander the open ocean preying on whatever they can find.

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Safari Flix

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: The Blue Realm
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.title: Stung by the Devil's Toilet Paper!
programme.desc: The Devil's Toilet Paper is a painful plant you'll never forget. Coyote experiences its stinging hairs and shows what NOT to do in the wild.Mark takes on the venomous stonefish, famous for the world's most painful sting. This one's not for the faint of heart.

programme.title: Attacked by Bloodsucking Parasites!
programme.desc: Bloodsucking bugs go on the attack! Coyote lets these parasites bite in real time to show how fast they latch and how to stop them.The echidna looks cute, but its spikes say otherwise. Mark handles this spiny Australian mammal and explains its strange biology.

programme.title: Don't Touch! – Up Close with a Rattlesnake!
programme.desc: Coyote gets dangerously close to a rattlesnake. With fangs bared and rattles shaking, he shows what happens when you get too near.An island crawling with dragons? Coyote explores a real-life dragon-infested zone where giant lizards roam freely—and dangerously.

programme.title: Stung by the Gympie Gympie! (World's Most Painful Plant Sting)
programme.desc: Coyote braves the Gympie Gympie, Australia's infamous pain plant. The sting leaves lasting effects and is known to bring grown men to tears.With nothing but his bare hands, Coyote tries catfish noodling—reaching into muddy water for a hidden monster. It's wild, messy, and risky.

programme.title: Giant Frog Kissed! – Prince or Princess?
programme.desc: In a fairytale-worthy twist, Coyote kisses a giant frog in the name of science and fun. Does it turn into royalty? You'll have to see.A sobering episode recounts a fatal snake bite case. Coyote shares what went wrong and what to do in the event of a venomous encounter.

programme.title: Milking the World's Most Venomous Spider!
programme.desc: Coyote attempts to milk the world's most venomous spider in a high-stakes episode filled with fangs, silk, and scientific precision.With panda-like fuzz and a sting that ranks among the worst, this ant is no pushover. Mark explains what makes the panda ant so formidable.

programme.title: Deadly Snake Milking Gone Wrong!
programme.desc: Things go south during a venom extraction. Coyote experiences the dangers firsthand in this episode where snake milking takes a scary turn.

programme.title: Mantis Shrimp Punch Test!
programme.desc: The mantis shrimp packs the fastest punch in nature. Coyote shows how its explosive strike can shatter shells—and maybe more.Maggots vs feet? Coyote steps into 300,000 larvae to demonstrate their bizarre biological purpose and what happens when they swarm.

programme.title: Scariest Pig on the Planet! (Bearded Pig of Borneo)
programme.desc: In Borneo, Mark encounters the bearded pig, a wild and intimidating animal with a face only a mother could love—plus tusks to match.Mark tracks down and is stung by a mammoth wasp—a rare species with a sting that ranks high on the pain scale.

programme.title: Bitten by the Black Flame Centipede! (Instant Regret)
programme.desc: The black flame centipede doesn't disappoint. Mark is bitten and nearly instantly regrets it in this creepy crawler showcase.Mark finds the bizarre ‘murder leaf,' a mysterious plant rumored to harm creatures on contact. Is the myth real? He investigates firsthand.

programme.title: Bitten by the Biggest Ant in the World!
programme.desc: The largest ant in the world? Mark puts its jaws to the test in an unforgettable, up-close bite challenge.Face-to-face with a killer hornet, Mark accepts another sting challenge to educate viewers about hornet defense and behavior.

programme.title: Stung by a Big Blue Bee!
programme.desc: A massive, electric-blue bee with a sting to match! Mark tests its painful jab while exploring its striking coloration and behavior.Meet the assassin bug: nature's silent killer. Mark gets bitten and shows how this bug dispatches prey with surgical precision.

programme.title: Prehistoric Creature Found Alive! (Trilobite Beetle)
programme.desc: It looks like something from another era—and it is! Mark discovers a trilobite beetle, a living relic that predates the dinosaurs.This giant black bee is more than just big—it's aggressive. Mark takes the sting and shows why it's one of the most feared pollinators.
